message: 🌱 Add dex: Possibility to select connector in client request mission (#656)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@ +{ + "version": "kc-mission-v1", + "name": "dex-1084-possibility-to-select-connector-in-client-request", + "missionClass": "solution", + "author": "KubeStellar Bot", + "authorGithub": "kubestellar", + "mission": { + "title": "dex: Possibility to select connector in client request", + "description": "Possibility to select connector in client request. Requested by 6+ users.", + "type": "feature", + "status": "completed", + "steps": [ + { + "title": "Check current dex deployment", + "description": "Verify your dex version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dex\nhelm list -n dex 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working dex installation." + }, + { + "title": "Review dex configuration", + "description": "Inspect the relevant dex configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n dex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dex\nkubectl get configmap -n dex -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dex\n```\nRight now if there is more than one connector configured user has to select one before he is redirected to the authentication page. It should be possible to skip that step if a client has preferred connector, e.g. google." + }, + { + "title": "Apply the fix for Possibility to select connector in client request", + "description": "Agree with above, this is not a good solution when utilizing open source clients that check for `. /well-known/openid-configuration` ... I modified the logs in dex to show this issue in practice when I try to pass the `connector_id` via query param from an open source client.\n\n```\n400 Bad Request:\n```yaml\n400 Bad Request: \n\n \n \n \n dex\n \n \n \n \n \n\n \n
\n
\n \n
\n
\n\n \n\n \n \n \n dex\n \n \n \n \n \n\n \n
\n
\n \n
\n
\n\n
\n\n\n
\n

Bad Request

\n

Connector ID does not match a valid Connector: okta-argo/.well-known/openid-configuration

\n=1.24", + "tools": [ + "kubectl" + ], + "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with dex installed or the issue environment reproducible." + }, + "security": { + "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:30:48.935Z", + "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0", + "sanitized": true, + "findings": [] + } +}
